data.name: Futa Hero
data.detailed_description:
Across the vast lands of Futarion, countless Heroes rise—individuals born with rare power and an unwavering resolve.

Scattered across every kingdom and frontier, these Heroes stand as the last defense between civilization and the growing tide of monsters. Their main objective is to achieve peace between all kingdoms and act as the people’s champion.

Among them stands one Hero whose journey is about to begin...

The game features classic turn-based combat, character progression, and exploration, paired with adult content and fuck or be fucked mechanics that play a role in both gameplay and narrative.

Fight enemies and control the monster population by fighting in an old-style rpg battle system. Unlock various hentai scenes by completing quests and upgrade your equipment to fight even stronger monsters! Bring peace to the villagers and satisfy your lust in one go, get ready to be the Futa Hero!

Futa Hero is intended for mature audiences and focuses on consensual adult interactions within a fictional fantasy setting.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card
